race.comment: Strong race to end the day. WOOTTEN IT BE NICE (11) smart filly who was heavily supported on resumption before knocking up in the straight to finish seventh over 1200m at Kembla Grange. Looking for the extra trip and undefeated second-up. Go close. TURBULENT (7) sharp weight drop when he swooped late to score with plenty up the sleeve over 1300m at Narromine. This is no tougher and he gets a similar run today. IVY DIVA (9) underrated mare who sprinted well at big odds with a handy third over 1200m at Gosford. Goes well on her home track and can take a hand in the finish. CONDONE (1) won his maiden two back at Warwick Farm then could only manage eighth last start over 1300m at Warwick Farm. Back in grade and keep safe for the new yard.
